subject: Browser polling cache control
fact: ClaudeDataSource uses fetch(..., { cache: 'no-store' }) for hub polling endpoints such as /api/sessions, /api/teams, /api/usage, /api/tasks, and /api/history so repeated browser polls always see fresh state instead of cached snapshots.
reason: This is an important future debugging and review note because live browser refresh issues can look like websocket problems when the actual root cause is cached polling responses. Remembering that the polling layer is explicitly no-store will help avoid reintroducing stale-session behavior.
